stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct when talking about an aeroplane with turbojet engines?

options.a: The speed for minimum thrust required is used to fly the long-range cruise regime.
options.b: The speed for maximum thrust required is used to climb with the best rate of climb.
options.c: The speed for minimum thrust required is used to climb with the best angle of climb.
options.d: The speed for maximum thrust required is used to obtain a maximum range in a descent.
